## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new connector, schema type, module, or capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix in existing code
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `schema` — changes to `schema/` models
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, config, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Code runs without errors locally (`make example` or equivalent)
- [ ] If adding a connector: `PYTHONPATH=. python3 connectors/<name>/connector.py` runs cleanly
- [ ] If adding a connector: `connectors/<name>/README.md` documents the source and caveats
- [ ] No private data, API keys, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive (`type: what and why`, not `fix stuff`)

- **Access method:** (Open API / CSV bulk download / HTML scrape / PDF)

- **Known limitations:**
